item.title: Dump, slight trans theme
item.description:
Life lesson
So confused. ?
YES
I found a collection of weird things men have said about women. Above is the first one.
Number two!
...aaaand number three!
Spiderbro from my house.
David Tennant! <3
Not quite, but still funny
For the trans girls!
Pebbling, love it
I have this. Highly recommend
Ohno
Love this @Knightmage !
A much better take than not saying anything for sure
item.dc:creator: WarpQueen

item.title: This cracked rock fits back seamlessly as if there was never a crack
item.dc:creator: Manceetwore

item.title: Salma Hayek, the actress, turned 58 on September 2nd
item.description:
She is known for such movies as Desperado ...
and The Eternals ...
and From Dusk Till Dawn ...
and Traffic ...
and Savages ...
and Once Upon A Time In Mexico ...
and Frida ...
and Spy Kids 3: Game Over ...
and After The Sunset ...
and Lonely Hearts ...
and Fair Game ...
and The Faculty ...
and many more.
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
Fun stuff. It’s actually my birthday and I’m dragging ass so today is the day to send all the uplifting things you ungrateful fucks. Same name on discord, smooches.
item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: I Stole This Dump So You Don't Have To! Tuesday Random MEMES that made me chuckle
item.description:
1. It's like they are named with a random name generator but half of the words are dirty. Also why are so many -HAMs in the names of places. Nothingham? What does it mean?
2
3. Wait, you should guns just for fun?
4. This dog give his celery review
5. How do I unlock this move, is it a DLC or something?
6. She uses the hat to hide her elf ears (also she is really pretty :) )
7. Guys will do anything to get a girl to hold their hand
8. Is the supposed to TURN ME OFF?? Plan failed
9. Well, they came to help move the car from the side of the road. It has been moved.
10. Healing spell didn't work, huh?
11
12. "Pff Pussy, throwing water at me"
13. These Zero Budget recreations are amazing
14. How? Just how? Why? Why??? WHY??? JUST WHY?? I feel that is the harder thing to do
15. Hey silly friendos! I'm happy you made it till the end of this dump, I truly hope it entertained you! In the last slide I would just want to share with you that I'm working on game of mine that has some pretty wacky humor like in this dump and some wacky characters (The Ghost Banana, The Judgmental Washing Machine, The Nihilist Crepes) and it would mean the world to me if you wishlisted on Steam! Even if you're not planning on buying on launch or anything like that, just a wishlist would help to get it in front of more people! Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Thank you for your help and support and have a great week :))
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: I don't have a stutter but I know a few who do and we've all noticed that when you're busy remembering something you don't stutter because your brain's too busy to let you get nervous.

item.title: Images of Note: Five African Grey parrots
item.description:
*looks at camera*
This is not the only piss meme in this dump
There's the other one :)
Cursed
I hate it.
guys...do you...do....do you know....do you....
HELL YEAH LINUX!
I remember when twitter was good. That was a lovely day. That day was 20 September 2015 when PIgGate happened.
Every time someone says "getting rid of regulations will make y cheaper", they need someone to ask them "why would they want to make less money than they do now?"
It's Baguette!
Bridgerton!
Brimstone
Basket!
Bridgenorth!
Bremen!
Biscuit!
Breathmint!
Basement!
Backspace!
Broxburn!
Bathgate!
Ever notice how they're banning books written about things like the Holocaust and Slavery over in America? I wonder why they wouldn't want kids knowing that kinda thing? Just a reminder, the second to last living person born into slavery in America died after being hit by a car in 1972.
Boobies really are Superb!
WELCOME TO THE CUM PARK!
if wizards are analogous to computer programmers/hackers, this is the equivalent of shutting down a computer by...er...throwing a brick at it.
Poyo
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: The Japanese pro wrestling scene is wild
item.description:
This wrestler is called "Mizuki" and she calls this move of hers "Spinning Candy"
I don't know this kid's name but he's like 9 years old in these clips.
The girl is Tsukasa Fujimoto. The female panda is Tin Tin, the wife of the male panda that comes in later. The male panda is called Andre-za the Giant Panda.
The guy with the gyrating hips is "Hard Gay", I don't know the M. Bison wannabe's name. It doesn't take a fluent speaker of Japanese to make a fairly accurate guess about what "M. Bison" is saying.
Takayuki Ueki, in the middle of an unfair 1 vs 10 man tag team, produced a gun and held up all 10 of his opponents at gun point.
The guy is the wrestler known in Japan as "Kenny Omega". The little girl is Haruka.
item.dc:creator: BerryBnuuy
